channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FEDFINA] Trading Window Closure Notice by Fedbank Financial Services Ltd for Q4 FY2025-2026
item.description:
Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has announced the closure of the Trading Window under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The closure is applicable to Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives. The Trading Window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the date of declaration of audited financial results of the Company for the quarter and the financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the approval of the financial results will be informed separately.

  • Fedbank Financial Services Ltd announces closure of Trading Window under SEBI regulations for Q4 FY2025-2026
  • The closure is applicable to Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives
  • Trading Window to remain closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • The date of the Board Meeting for financial results approval will be informed separately
  • The announcement is in line with the Company’s Code of Conduct for regulating, monitoring and reporting of trading of insiders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VPRPL] Trading Window Closure Announced by Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd for Quarter and Year Ended March 2026
item.description:
Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Insiders are advised not to deal in the Equity Shares of the Company during this period. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window closure announced for the quarter and year ended March 2026
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Applies to all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • In accordance with SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct
  • Date of Board Meeting for financial results declaration to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vishnu Prakash R Punglia Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FINCABLES] Finolex Cables Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure from April 1, 2026
item.description:
Finolex Cables Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for dealing in securities of the company. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, and will remain in force until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the regulations and the code of conduct of the company.

  • Finolex Cables Ltd announces trading window closure from April 1, 2026
  • Closure is in accordance with the company's code of conduct and regulations
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FINOLEX CABLES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [CHOKSILA] Choksi Laboratories Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure from 01.04.2026
item.description:
Choksi Laboratories Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and all connected persons as defined in the Code, effective from 01.04.2026 until the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026. This decision is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 and BSE circular No. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20 dated April, 2019. The Company has also complied with the requirements of Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) Circular No. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-SEC- 4/P/CIR/2022/107 dated August 5, 2022 and SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2023/124 dated July 19, 2023, regarding Trading Window Closure period under Clause 4 of Schedule B read with Regulation 9 of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 (“PIT Regulations”) framework for restricting trading by Designated Persons (“DPs”) by freezing PAN at security level. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026, will be informed in due course.

  • Trading window closure from 01.04.2026 until completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026
  • Compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 and BSE circular No. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20 dated April, 2019
  • Compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) Circular No. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-SEC- 4/P/CIR/2022/107 and SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-PoD-2/P/CIR/2023/124
  • Freezing of PAN at security level for Designated Persons
  • The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited Financial Results will be informed in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHOKSI LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [OXFORDIN] Trading Window Closure for Oxford Industries Ltd until 48 hours after Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Oxford Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons until 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The board meeting for approving the audited financial results is scheduled to be held on or before May 30, 2026. Designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the company during the aforesaid period of closure.

  • Trading window closure for Oxford Industries Ltd until 48 hours after Q1 2026 results
  • Closure is in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Board meeting for approving the audited financial results scheduled on or before May 30, 2026
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to trade during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oxford Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TECHIN] Techindia Nirman Ltd Closes Trading Window Ahead of Q4, FY26 Results
item.description:
Techindia Nirman Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's PIT Code. The window will remain closed from Wednesday, 01st April, 2026 up to 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended, i.e. 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the financial results declaration will be informed separately.

  • Techindia Nirman Ltd closes trading window in line with SEBI regulations and company's PIT Code
  • Trading window to remain closed from 01st April, 2026 to 48 hours post Q4, FY26 financial results declaration
  • The date of the Board Meeting for financial results declaration will be announced separately
  • The announcement is for information and record purpose

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TECHINDIA NIRMAN LIMITED | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GENPHARMA] Genpharmasec Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Genpharmasec Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading and Disclosure Practices. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Financial year ended March 31, 2026. All Promoter and Promoter group, Directors, KMP's, Designated Persons, Connected Persons of the Company and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the securities of the Company during this period. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Genpharmasec Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and Company's Code of Conduct
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • All designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in securities during this period
  • Date of Board of Directors' meeting to consider and approve Audited Financial Results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Genpharmasec Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RBGUPTA] Aarcon Facilities Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Aarcon Facilities Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives, as per the Company's Code of Conduct under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure began on 1st April, 2026 and will continue till 48 hours after the dissemination of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended 31 March, 2026. The Board Meeting is scheduled to consider and approve these results. An intimation regarding the notice of the Board Meeting will be sent separately to the Stock Exchange.

  • Trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives closed from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure to remain in effect till 48 hours after dissemination of Audited Financial Results for Q4 and year ended 31 March, 2026
  • Board Meeting scheduled to consider and approve these results
  • Intimation regarding the notice of the Board Meeting to be sent separately to the Stock Exchange

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: R.B.GUPTA FINANCIALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PFLINFOTC] PFL Infotech Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
PFL Infotech Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure is in accordance with the Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading under SEBI regulations. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This applies to all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and all connected persons covered under the company’s Code of Conduct. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited financial results of the company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, will be informed in due course.

  • PFL Infotech Ltd closes trading window for dealing in company securities.
  • Closure in accordance with the Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading under SEBI regulations.
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.
  • Applies to all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and all connected persons covered under the company’s Code of Conduct.
  • Date of Board of Directors' meeting to approve Audited financial results to be informed in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PFL INFOTECH LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [20MICRONS] Trading Window Closure Announced by 20 Microns Ltd Until 48 Hours Post-Board Meeting in April 2026
item.description:
20 Microns Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting where the audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026, will be considered and approved. The closure applies to all Designated Persons, including Promoters, Directors, Key Managerial Personnel, Senior Management Personnel, and their immediate relatives. The date of the Board Meeting will be intimated separately.

  • Trading window closure announced by 20 Microns Ltd
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-Board Meeting
  • Applies to all Designated Persons, including Promoters and Directors
  • Relates to the consideration and approval of audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY ending March 31, 2026
  • Board Meeting date to be announced separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 20 MICRONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
